overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt trail through tall grass at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a survival or horror video game, featuring a dark natural environment with dense vegetation lining the path.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along a narrow dirt trail through dense tall grass at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The path is flanked by vegetation with bushes visible on the right side and open sky above. Near the end of the segment, light rain begins to fall, visible as streaks in the light beam.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark rural trail that transitions from a dry night walk into a rainy descent. It begins with the camera advancing along a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight beam cuts through the darkness to reveal dense tall grass and thick bushes lining the right side. As the camera pushes further into the natural environment, the open sky above remains dark while the light focuses on the immediate vegetation. The scene then shifts as light rain begins to fall, becoming visible as shimmering streaks dancing within the flashlight's beam before the shot concludes.
